[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001101011 5
1 101110110 6
2 100111011 6
3 101011010 5
4 011011111 7
5 010111111 7
6 110001111 6
7 010110011 5

01 110111111 8

56 110101111 7
67 111111111 a
70 111001111 7

24 101111110 7
35 111111111 a

71 110001111 6 match 6
